calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-06-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew Schultz for petitioners Pedro Victorino Rubio and Marta Lillian Martratt.

Mr. Schultz explained he had previously been in possession of the original will, but that it was subsequently lost during an office move.

The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated September 29, 2000 was admitted to probate.

Pedro Victorino Rubio and Marta Lillian Martratt were appointed as Co-Administrators with will annexed, with limited IAEA authority. Bond was set at $54,000.00.

Amy Harrington was appointed probate referee.

The Court set a status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration for October 4, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed at least two weeks prior to the status date, no appearance is required.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-16-2026 Continued To Apr-06-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
